_doc.purpose: Fertility-increasing medication (real-world analogue: clomiphene citrate / letrozole). Both raise FSH so a follicle that would otherwise stall matures and ovulates. Modeled here as a temporary multiplier on the fertility side of reproduction, driven by a decaying status applied by an ingestible pill.
_doc.mother_effect: stats_derived_fertilityMultiplier on the mother scales accumulateOvuPower in BodyInternal_Womb.ovulation() (Womb.cs) - more/likelier eggs released per ovulation.
_doc.father_effect: stats_derived_fertilityMultiplier on the father (read off the Item_Instance_Cum owner) scales BodyInternal_Womb.CalcFertility() (Womb.cs) - higher per-egg conception chance.
_doc.neutral_default: Default value is 1.0 (no modifiers) so any character never given the status/item behaves exactly as before this feature was added.

list.tooltip: Multiplies fertility-related odds: mother's egg-release count/chance during ovulation, and father's per-egg conception chance. 1.0 = normal, unaffected.
list._note: statKeyword left empty on purpose so this resolves on every character (male or female) - both parents need it.

list._comment: Applied by consumable_medicine_fertility. Severity spikes near 100 on dose, then decays naturally back to 0 over about 6 in-game days, tapering the fertility bonus down through the tiers below as it fades.

baselineVariation._decaySpeed_note: severity/minute. ~100 severity / 0.012 per min =~ 8300 min =~ 5.8 days to fully decay.

list.tooltip: An oral fertility medication. Encourages the body to mature and release eggs more readily for several days after taking it.

comp_Ingestible._note: Plausible oral-tablet pacing (unlike consumable_medicine_analgesic's intentionally fast debug numbers): ~1hr onset, digests over ~10min once absorption starts, dose sized to push chara_status_fertility_boost to ~100 severity (top tier) immediately.

en-us.stats_derived_fertilityMultiplier_toolti: Multiplies fertility-related odds: egg-release count/chance during ovulation, and per-egg conception chance. 1.0 = normal.

zh-cn.stats_derived_fertilityMultiplier_toolti: 影响生育相关的几率：排卵时的排卵数量/几率，以及每颗卵子的受孕几率。1.0 为正常值。
zh-cn.consumable_medicine_fertility_tooltip:
口服药物。服用后数日内，会增强生育能力
%%stats_derived_fertilityMultiplier%%：%%stats_derived_fertilityMultiplier_tooltip%%
